reforms.description: The Federal Government re-introduced the Reconstruction Loan Corporation's low-interest credit programmes aimed at supporting medium-sized enterprises, facilitating their access to necessary funding for investment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing low-interest loans, the reform enhances the financial capacity of medium-sized enterprises, promoting investment and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The low-interest credit programmes were re-introduced to support medium-sized enterprises.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it directly addresses the financing needs of medium-sized enterprises, which are crucial for economic growth and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: re-introduction of the Reconstruction Loan Corporation's low-interest credit programmes for medium-sized enterprises.
